name: Treasure Hunter: Idle RPG
short_description: Let your team kill the bad guys and gather all sorts of loot for you to play with
detailed_description:
Send your characters to adventures on different maps and watch them gather many kinds of exciting loot for you.

Adana is an exciting world where each map is guarded by a guardian deity. Defeat the map monsters and bosses, then challenge the guardians for a chance to get even better loot.

Create your own build - Setup your skill rotation by using one basic ability, one special ability, one aura and 3 utility skills. Try various spells to see which one works best for your build.

Build your team - Start the game as a warrior, then unlock the archer and priest characters and add them to your team.

Randomized loot - Inspired by traditional ARPG's, there are 4 rarities (normal, magic, rare, unique). Stats will get stronger as item level goes higher.

Alchemy - You can create various consumables such as exp and drop charms or stat boosting potions.

Crafting - Craft on existing items, upgrade their tiers or reshuffle their stats.

Loot - Several armor sets with randomized stats, 20+ unique items, multiple weapon types with more coming soon.
